linting.notes: No linting configured. Shellcheck would be appropriate for bash scripts but is not currently used.

setup_required: Requires jq: apt-get install -y jq (Debian/Ubuntu) or apk add jq (Alpine) or dnf install -y jq (RHEL/Fedora)
Requires podman or docker: apt-get install -y podman or dnf install -y podman
Scanner pulls Bandit container image on first run: ghcr.io/pycqa/bandit/bandit:latest (~50MB)
testing.mock_patterns: Test fixtures include compliant_project and violating_project directories with Python code samples
testing.notes: Tests validate the FIPS compliance scanner by running it against fixture projects and checking JSON output. Tests require a working container runtime (podman/docker) because the scanner runs Bandit in a container. Current status: 8/10 tests pass on host, 2 test assertion failures (not infrastructure issues). Container-in-container validation fails due to nested podman complexity.

ci.notes: No CI/CD configuration found. No GitHub Actions, Tekton, Jenkins, or other CI system detected.

build.notes: This is a collection of bash scripts - no build or compilation required. The scanner scripts are executable as-is.

conventions.test_naming: Test functions named test_* within the test script
conventions.import_style: Shell scripts use 'source' to import library scripts from lib/ directory
conventions.notes: Shell scripts consistently use 'set -euo pipefail' for error handling. Test fixtures follow Python project structure patterns.

test_commands.notes: On host: 8/10 tests pass, 2 test assertion failures. In container: fails due to nested container complexity (podman-in-podman). The scanner itself requires podman/docker to run Bandit container.

container_recipe.notes: Container-in-container setup is complex. Tests work best when run on a host with properly configured podman/docker. The scanner pulls ghcr.io/pycqa/bandit/bandit:latest on first run. For air-gapped environments, pre-pull this image.

validation.summary: Tests run on host: 8/10 pass. Scanner functional but 2 test assertions fail. Container-in-container validation not practical due to nested podman complexity.

gaps: No linting (shellcheck would be appropriate for bash scripts)
